name: Pei

skills.name: Blast
skills.description: In human form, Basic Attacks have increased range and deal extra magical damage while recovering Energy. Consecutive hits on the same target will stack damage.

skills.name: Striker Stance
skills.description: Fires Inner Energy in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in its path and slowing them. Recovers Energy upon hit.

skills.name: Guarding Stance
skills.description: Grants shield points and increases Attack SpeedDeals damage to enemies in range, and continuously deals damage for aperiod of time.

skills.name: Tiger Form
skills.description: Switches to tiger form, gaining Movement Speed and enhancing the next 2 Basic Attacks. The 1st Basic Attack lets him dash toward a locked-on target, damaging and slowing them. The 2nd Basic Attack deals magical damage.

tips: Pei is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.7% win rate and 0.3% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Rapacious Bite → Boots of Resistance → Axe of Torment → Master Sword → Doomsday.
Run Conflict for stats that match Pei's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Striker Stance → Guarding Stance → Tiger Form → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
Teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
Pei excels into Arthur, Lu Bu, Wuyan. Avoid blind picking into Gan & Mo, Meng Ya, Milady without team peel.

Pei sits at Tier B globally (52.7% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: Is Pei good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Pei is Tier B Assassin with 52.7% win rate, 0.3% pick rate, and 0.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Pei build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Master Sword, siege breaker, Doomsday. Run Conflict arcana with Smite. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Pei?
faqs.answer: Pick Gan & Mo, Meng Ya, Milady into Pei. Deny Jungling resources early and force fights before Pei completes core items. Pei struggles when the enemy can peel and group them.

faqs.question: Who does Pei counter?
faqs.answer: Pei is strong into Arthur, Lu Bu, Wuyan according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Pei when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Jungling lane.

faqs.question: Is Pei good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Pei sits at Tier B globally (52.7% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: What lane should Pei play?
faqs.answer: Pei is tagged Jungling in Camp export (Assassin). Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Pei?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Conflict arcana. Battle spell: Smite. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Pei or Wukong — which is better?
faqs.answer: Pei vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Pei has +2.9% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Pei when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Pei?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.1%). Focus bans on higher-tier Assassin picks unless targeting a one-trick.

metaAnalysis: Tier B Assassin · Jungling · difficulty Medium.

Pei sits at Tier B globally (52.7% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
Matchups: strong into Arthur, Lu Bu, Wuyan; weak into Gan & Mo, Meng Ya, Milady.
Pei vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Pei has +2.9% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Pei when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Pei vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Pei has +2.0% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Pei when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.
Draft tip: counter-pick or comfort pick when lane matchup is favorable.
